name: Large Concrete Soy Candle - Spiced South Sea Lime
description: These beautiful and unique Wooden Wick Concrete Candle is one of our favourites. They have a natural and raw appearance that gives a light and loving feel..Felt pads have been added to the bottom to prevent the scratching of surfaces. The natural wooden wick creates the soothing sound of a crackling fire! The design of the concrete pot allows reusing it to integrate it into your decor once the candle is consumed such as a plant pot.  The good thing about using a material such as concrete means that every item made is unique with its own anomalies and quirk. It also makes the perfect Valentine's gift, wedding favour and table decoration.

Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Rosemary
description: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Rosemary Bring the grounding scent of a herb garden indoors. This rosemary candle blends natural soy wax with pure essential oils, releasing a clean, herbal aroma that feels fresh, calming, and quietly uplifting as it burns. Hand-poured by Agnes + Cat, this candle features a wooden wick that gently crackles when lit, adding warmth and character to the room. The soy wax burns evenly and cleanly, making it ideal for slow evenings, mindful moments, or everyday home fragrance.The candle is set in a rustic terracotta-style pot and presented on a black metal stand, designed to look as good unlit as it does glowing. Once finished, the pot can be reused as a small planter or decorative container, keeping it useful long after the wax is gone.Naturally vegan-friendly and made with care, the Herb Garden Rosemary candle suits kitchens, living spaces, and anywhere that benefits from a fresh, botanical scent inspired by nature.

name: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Clove
description: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Clove Warm, spicy and grounding, this clove-scented herb garden candle brings a cosy, comforting atmosphere to any space. The rich aroma of clove fills the room with gentle warmth, making it ideal for slow evenings, quiet moments, or relaxed home styling. Made with natural soy wax and a wooden wick, this candle produces a soft crackle as it burns, adding to its calming, fireside feel. It is poured into a rustic terracotta pot, displayed on a simple black metal stand that gives the candle a distinctive, decorative presence even when unlit.Presented in kraft packaging, the candle feels earthy and considered, making it a thoughtful gift or a characterful addition to shelves, side tables, or living spaces. Once finished, the pot can be reused, adding to its long-term appeal.A comforting herbal fragrance with visual charm, designed for those who enjoy warm scents and natural home accents.

name: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Mint
description: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Mint Fresh and cooling, this mint-scented soy candle brings a garden-fresh feel into the home. The crisp herbal aroma feels clean and uplifting, ideal for brightening living spaces, kitchens, or work areas with a natural, refreshing scent. Poured into a rustic terracotta pot, the candle sits in a simple black metal stand that elevates it slightly, giving it a relaxed, earthy look. A wooden wick adds gentle character as it burns, while the natural soy wax ensures a clean, even flame. The illustrated kraft box makes it an easy choice for gifting or seasonal home styling.Designed to be enjoyed slowly, this mint candle suits those who prefer fresh, herbal fragrances with a natural, understated aesthetic.

name: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Lavender
description: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Lavender Soft, calming and gently herbal, this lavender candle brings a sense of quiet ease into any space. Poured with soy wax and scented with lavender, it’s designed for slow moments, evening wind-downs, and a more relaxed home atmosphere. Set in a rustic terracotta-style pot with a wooden wick, the candle sits neatly in a black metal stand that lifts it slightly from the surface, adding a decorative, garden-inspired feel. The patterned pot and natural kraft box give it an earthy, considered look that works just as well as a gift as it does on a shelf or side table.Lavender is traditionally loved for its soothing, familiar aroma, making this candle an easy choice for bedrooms, living spaces, or quiet corners of the home. A simple, thoughtful piece that blends scent, warmth, and design without feeling overdone.

name: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Sage
description: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Sage Bring a sense of calm and clarity into the home with the Agnes + Cat Sage Herb Garden Candle. The soft, earthy aroma of sage creates a grounding atmosphere, ideal for slow evenings, mindful moments, or simply resetting the space. Poured into a rustic, plant-pot–style ceramic holder and set on a minimalist black metal stand, this candle is designed to feel like part of the home rather than just a scent. The natural soy wax is paired with a wooden wick, giving a gentle, comforting burn that suits relaxed, everyday use.Presented in recyclable kraft packaging with botanical artwork, the Sage Herb Garden Candle makes a thoughtful gift or a timeless addition to living spaces, bedrooms, or reading corners. A simple way to bring the feeling of an herb garden indoors, all year round.

name: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Geranium
description: Agnes + Cat Herb Garden Candles - Geranium A soft, floral scent with a gentle green edge, this Geranium Herb Garden Candle brings an easy, uplifting warmth to everyday spaces. Poured into a rustic terracotta pot and finished with a natural wooden wick, it’s designed to feel calm, earthy, and quietly comforting. The soy wax candle sits in a patterned ceramic-style holder, supported by a simple black metal stand that lifts it slightly off the surface. When lit, the wooden wick gives a steady flame and a subtle crackle, adding to the relaxed, home-grown feel. The geranium fragrance is fresh and balanced rather than sweet, ideal for living spaces, bedrooms, or moments when you want the room to feel light but grounded.Presented in a kraft box with botanical detailing, this candle makes a thoughtful gift or a natural addition to home décor. Once the candle is finished, the pot can be reused as a small planter or decorative piece, keeping the Herb Garden look going a little longer.
